Amended Notice Of Motion To Strike Portions Of Pltf'S Petition For Writ Of Mandamus
Off Calendar Nov-14-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANTS ADOLPH GASSER INC.,(REAL PARTY IN INTEREST), ADOLPH AND MARIAN V GASSER REV. TRUST'S Amended Notice Of Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiff's Petition For Writ Of Mandamus is GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. Prevailing party is to prepare a form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen CSR # 8189 =301/PJB

MOTION TO STRIKE
Off Calendar Sep-03-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: The tentative ruling required the moving party to provide the Court with a proof of service. There being no appearances to do so, the Court took RESPONDENT ADOLPH GASSER INC., (REAL PARTY IN INTEREST), ADOLPH AND MARIAN V GASSER REV. TRUST'S MOTION TO STRIKE off calendar. (302/PJM) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600
